name: Pappa Al Pomodoro
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Can Italian tomatoes, undrained & chopped
1 medium Leek, white part only, washed well and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy stockpot and stir well.
2. Cover and simmer for 45 to 60 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
3. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 1 hour. The mixture should be very thick.
4. Before serving, stir the soup well to break up all the bread pieces.
5. Ladle into individual bowls and sprinkle with a little extra-virgin olive oil and salt and pepper.
6. Serve lukewarm or reheat.
